featured.name: Smart Notes API
featured.description: Production-grade note-taking backend with JWT auth, full-text search, tagging, and Spring AI powered summarization.
featured.longDescription: A comprehensive notes platform built with Spring Boot 3.5, featuring role-based access control, refresh-token rotation, PostgreSQL full-text search, and an AI summarization endpoint powered by Spring AI + OpenAI.

featured.name: E-Commerce API
featured.description: Scalable multi-vendor commerce backend with cart, checkout, payments and event-driven order processing.
featured.longDescription: Modular monolith with clean-architecture boundaries, Stripe integration, Kafka-based order events, Redis-backed cart sessions, and comprehensive audit logging.

featured.name: Task Flow API
featured.description: Collaborative task management platform with realtime updates, team workspaces and role-based permissions.
featured.longDescription: Kanban-style task engine supporting workspaces, boards, WebSocket realtime sync, activity streams, and granular RBAC across organizations.

frontend.name: Premium Portfolio UI
frontend.description: This portfolio site — React 19, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion. Fully responsive premium dark UI.

frontend.name: Admin Console
frontend.description: Companion admin dashboard for the Smart Portfolio API — manage content, projects and messages.
